isolation.reservedState: successful onboarding path; preserve created company/agent/issue/run for follow-up validators

assertions.title: Onboarding with codex_local creates an audit-ready company

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3100 on a zero-company instance
steps.observed: Onboarding wizard opened with company, agent, task, and launch steps

steps.action: Enter company details and continue to the agent step
steps.expected: Company info is accepted and onboarding advances
steps.observed: Created company named 'Audit Demo Company' with issue prefix AUD

steps.action: Select the recommended Codex Local agent and run the environment check
steps.expected: codex_local readiness is visibly successful before continuing
steps.observed: Adapter selection stayed on Codex Local and the UI showed the environment check as 'Passed'

steps.action: Seed the starter task and finish onboarding via Create & Open Issue
steps.expected: The first company, first agent, and first issue are created and the operator lands in a usable company-scoped view
steps.observed: Landed on /AUD/issues/AUD-1 with working company navigation, CEO agent visible, and the seeded issue open

assertions.title: Onboarding launch starts the seeded company loop

steps.action: Reach the Launch step and click Create & Open Issue
steps.expected: The seeded onboarding issue is created and enters the normal company loop
steps.observed: Issue AUD-1 opened immediately after onboarding and a heartbeat run was started for CEO

steps.action: Inspect the issue detail page after launch
steps.expected: Queued or running work is visible from the company-scoped issue surface
steps.observed: The issue page showed 'Live' with CEO run 5d580999 in running state and an Open run link

steps.action: Confirm the same run through API evidence
steps.expected: The seeded issue has matching active run evidence
steps.observed: issue-AUD-1-active-run.json and company-heartbeat-runs.json both report run 5d580999-33a2-4d1e-aa63-a9022349393f as running for CEO on AUD-1

frictions.description: The readiness indicator text surfaced as 'Passed' rather than the anticipated 'Environment ready', so the validation flow had to key off the visible pass state instead of that exact phrase.
frictions.resolution: Captured the visible 'Passed' state in the readiness screenshot and used it as the success signal.

frictions.description: The saved run log already contains failed reads for HEARTBEAT.md, SOUL.md, and TOOLS.md inside the agent workspace even though the onboarding assertions still passed.

summary: Tested 2 assertions through the real Web UI: VAL-DEMO-003 passed and VAL-DEMO-006 passed. Onboarding created company AUD, agent CEO, issue AUD-1, and running heartbeat run 5d580999-33a2-4d1e-aa63-a9022349393f; see the evidence bundle for screenshots, network traces, API snapshots, and run log output.
